summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The hydrated preflight artifact shows all ten listed refs are open pull requests and the job says this is not a dedupe cluster. Validator security quarantine rules require #48278 and #87681 to use route_security, so those exact items are routed to central OpenClaw security handling; the remaining eight PRs are kept independent. No shared canonical was selected and no close, merge, or fix action is planned.
